Core Elements of Human Antibiotic Stewardship Programs in Resource-Limited Settings 
Sept. 10, 2025 
At a glance 
The Core Elements of Human Antibiotic Stewardship Programs in Resource-Limited settings provide national and facility-level activities for antibiotic stewardship
